heromsg: Whether you need daily wage workers, helpers, technicians, welders, or operators, BookMyWorker ensures quick access to reliable and experienced manpower. Employers can post job requirements, receive multiple quotes from verified labour agents, and hire the best team that fits their budget, timeline, and convenience — all through one seamless platform.
aboutDescription: is a trusted and transparent manpower supply platform that connects employers with verified skilled, semi-skilled, and unskilled workers across India. We bridge the gap between labour demand and supply by simplifying the hiring process for factories, warehouses, construction sites, farms, and workshops.
aboutDescription1: Our mission is to make manpower hiring fast, reliable, and stress-free. Through our network of verified service agents and workers, we ensure that every employer finds the right workforce — and every worker gets fair, consistent employment opportunities.
aboutDescription2: At BookMyWorker, we believe that quality work begins with quality people. That’s why we focus on trust, transparency, and efficiency. Employers can easily post job requirements, compare quotes from verified labour suppliers, and hire the most suitable team — all in one place.
aboutDescription3: Our platform is built to support India’s growing industries by providing dependable manpower solutions at every level. Whether it’s a single-day task or a long-term contract, BookMyWorker delivers manpower that meets your expectations in both performance and professionalism.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.agent: These terms apply to all Worker Service Agents using BookMyWorker. By registering and using our services, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

employer.1: Employers must provide accurate and complete details during registration. Only authorized persons should use the employer account. We reserve the right to approve, suspend, or terminate any account if found violating terms.
employer.2: Employers can post job requirements and request workers as per their needs. Job details (work type, timing, payment, location) must be clear, honest, and legal. Worker assignments will be made through registered Worker Service Agents.
employer.3: All payments must be made directly to BookMyWorker. This includes: Workers’ wages (ensuring timely and transparent payments), service agent commissions, and platform fees. BookMyWorker will disburse payments to service agents for both worker wages and labour supply commissions. Delayed or non-payment to BookMyWorker may result in account suspension, penalties, or legal action.
employer.4: Employers must provide safe, legal, and respectful working conditions with basic facilities if applicable. Harassment, abuse, or discrimination is strictly prohibited.
employer.5: Employers must coordinate with assigned service agents for worker selection, onboarding, and issue resolution. Concerns about workers should be raised with the agent first.
employer.6: If a job needs to be cancelled or changed, notify the service agent at the earliest and provide a valid reason. Repeated or unfair cancellations may lead to restrictions.
employer.7: BookMyWorker is only a connecting platform and not the employer. We are not liable for work performance, loss, injury, or disputes, though we will help with resolution.
employer.8: Employer data will be kept confidential. Employers are also responsible for protecting workers’ information.
employer.9: Accounts may be suspended or removed for policy violations, non-payment, or unsafe/unethical treatment of workers.
employer.10: Employers must follow all applicable labor laws. Legal matters will fall under the jurisdiction of Rewa, Madhya Pradesh.
employer.11: BookMyWorker may update these terms. Continued use means acceptance of updated terms.

selfWorkerTerms.1: Workers must provide accurate personal details including name, contact number, skill type, and location at the time of registration. Only verified individuals are allowed. BookMyWorkers.com may verify, suspend, or terminate accounts.
selfWorkerTerms.2: Workers are responsible for providing true and complete information about their skills and experience, reporting on time, and completing assigned work responsibly.
selfWorkerTerms.3: Workers must accept jobs only if they are capable and available. Misconduct, misrepresentation, or refusal after confirmation may lead to suspension.
selfWorkerTerms.4: Workers should not approach employers for extra payments or side agreements. Payment will be as per agreed terms between employer, agent, and worker. BookMyWorkers.com is not responsible for external cash transactions.
selfWorkerTerms.5: Workers must be punctual and regular. In case of absence, they must inform the agent/employer at least one day in advance. Repeated absenteeism may lead to temporary or permanent suspension.
selfWorkerTerms.6: Workers must follow all safety instructions provided by employers or site supervisors. BookMyWorkers.com is not responsible for accidents or injuries due to negligence or unsafe practices.
selfWorkerTerms.7: Workers must maintain confidentiality of all personal, company, or job-related information obtained during work. Sharing without consent may result in termination and legal action.
selfWorkerTerms.8: Workers must use the BookMyWorkers.com platform only for genuine job-related activities. Fake profiles, misuse of contact information, or harassment will lead to permanent removal.
selfWorkerTerms.9: BookMyWorkers.com may suspend or remove a worker for false information, repeated complaints, misconduct, poor work quality, or violation of local laws or platform policies.
selfWorkerTerms.10: Workers must comply with local labour laws and ethical work practices. Any disputes related to work or payments will be under the jurisdiction of Rewa, Madhya Pradesh.
selfWorkerTerms.11: Terms may be updated periodically. Workers will be notified of significant changes. Continued use implies acceptance of updated terms.

agentTerms.1: Agents must provide valid identification and accurate registration details. Only verified individuals/agencies are approved. BookMyWorker may verify, suspend, or terminate accounts.
agentTerms.2: Agents act as a bridge between employers and workers: match suitable workers, coordinate jobs, maintain communication, and resolve minor issues.
agentTerms.3: Agents must verify identity, skills, and background of workers. Only job-ready workers should be assigned.
agentTerms.4: Agents must act with honesty and professionalism. Misuse of information or dishonest conduct leads to removal.
agentTerms.5: Agents will be informed of commission/service fees. Payments (if applicable) will be based on verified work. No extra fees may be demanded from employers or workers.
agentTerms.6: If a worker is unavailable, agents must notify the employer and arrange a replacement. Repeated failures may lead to suspension.
agentTerms.7: Agents must keep all data confidential. Sharing without consent is prohibited.
agentTerms.8: Agents must resolve disputes and concerns, and escalate serious issues to BookMyWorker.
agentTerms.9: Accounts may be terminated for rule violations, repeated complaints, or unethical conduct.
agentTerms.10: Agents must follow local labor laws. Disputes will be under Rewa, Madhya Pradesh jurisdiction.
agentTerms.11: Terms may change. Continued use implies acceptance.

termsCommon.intro: Welcome to BookMyWorkers.com. We are a digital platform that connects employers and individuals with skilled and unskilled workers through our registered Worker Service Agents. By using our website or mobile application, you agree to the following Terms and Conditions.
termsCommon.1: BookMyWorkers.com is designed to make collaboration easy between employers, workers, and service agents. Employers: Individuals or businesses seeking to hire workers. Workers: Individuals offering their labour and services. Worker Service Agents: Verified agents who assist employers in finding suitable workers.
termsCommon.2: You must be at least 18 years old to register and use our platform. All users must provide true, accurate, and complete information during registration. We reserve the right to approve, suspend, or terminate any account that violates our terms or policies.
termsCommon.3: Employers can post job requirements and hire workers through our verified service agents. Workers are assigned jobs based on their skills, location, and availability. Users agree to use the platform only for lawful and fair purposes.
termsCommon.4: Employers must pay BookMyWorker for workers’ wages on time, as agreed before the job begins. Any platform or service charges will be clearly communicated in advance. In case of delayed or failed payments, BookMyWorker reserves the right to suspend services or accounts.
termsCommon.5: Employers must provide a safe, respectful, and lawful work environment. Any form of discrimination, harassment, abuse, or unfair treatment towards workers is strictly prohibited. Workers are encouraged to report unsafe or unfair work conditions directly to BookMyWorker or the Service Agent.
termsCommon.6: Agents are responsible for worker verification, job matching, and coordination. Employers must cooperate with agents to ensure smooth operations. Agents may also help resolve disputes between employers and workers when possible.
termsCommon.7: Employers may cancel a job before confirmation. If a worker has already been assigned, cancellation must be made with a valid reason and sufficient notice. Repeated or unjustified cancellations may result in restrictions or account suspension.
termsCommon.8: We are committed to protecting users’ personal data. Information will not be shared with third parties without consent, except when required by law. Users are responsible for maintaining confidentiality of login details and safeguarding data.
termsCommon.9: In case of disputes between employers, workers, or agents, BookMyWorker will attempt to resolve them fairly and promptly. All parties must cooperate during the resolution process. If the issue cannot be resolved internally, it will be subject to legal proceedings under applicable law.
termsCommon.10: BookMyWorkers.com acts as a facilitator and is not the direct employer of workers. We are not liable for any loss, injury, or damages arising during employment. However, we are committed to supporting users, resolving complaints, and improving services.
termsCommon.11: These terms may be updated from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated to users through our website or app. Continuing to use the platform after updates implies acceptance of the revised terms.
termsCommon.12: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Any legal matters will fall under the jurisdiction of courts in Rewa, Madhya Pradesh.
termsCommon.13: For assistance or queries, please reach us at: Email: support@bookmyworkers.com | Phone: +91 7389791873 | Website: www.BookMyWorkers.com

manpowerSupply: Your Trusted Partner in Workforce Solutions
workerAgentDescription: As a Worker Service Agent, you can double or even triple your income by simply connecting skilled and unskilled workers from your local area with employers who need manpower. BookMyWorker gives you a powerful platform to register workers, share job requirements, and earn commission for every successful placement — without any investment or risk. You work from your phone, at your convenience, and earn every time your workers get hired. Whether you're in a city or a rural area, you can build a strong network of workers and become the go-to person for local labor needs.
employerDescription: As an employer, you can find timely, reliable, and skilled workers through BookMyWorker — a platform that connects you with verified Worker Service Agents in your area. These agents manage local labor pools and ensure that workers are matched to your job requirements quickly and efficiently. Whether you need skilled professionals like masons, welders, or electricians, or unskilled helpers for short- or long-term projects, BookMyWorker streamlines the entire process — saving you time, effort, and ensuring quality service.

agentFaqs.question: 1: What is BookMyWorker?
agentFaqs.answer: BookMyWorker is an online platform that connects workers and employers. You can become a Worker Service Agent, help workers get jobs, and earn commission.

agentFaqs.question: 2: Who can become a Worker Service Agent?
agentFaqs.answer: Anyone who can connect local workers and help them find jobs can become an agent.

agentFaqs.question: 3: Is there any fee to become an agent?
agentFaqs.answer: No, becoming an agent is completely free of cost.

agentFaqs.question: 4: What does an agent do?
agentFaqs.answer: An agent collects worker details, adds them to our platform, and provides them to employers when needed.

agentFaqs.question: 5: How much commission will I get?
agentFaqs.answer: You get a fixed commission for each worker's joining. The amount depends on the type of work and location.

agentFaqs.question: 6: How do I add workers?
agentFaqs.answer: You need to add the worker's name, mobile number, location, and skills in the Worker List. Or, you can take help from our support team to add them.

agentFaqs.question: 7: Can I work from home?
agentFaqs.answer: Yes, you can do everything from your mobile at home. Sometimes you may need to meet employers or visit work locations.

agentFaqs.question: 8: What if a worker doesn’t get a job?
agentFaqs.answer: Their info will stay in the system. As soon as there's a requirement in your area, you’ll get notified via WhatsApp and the BookMyWorker app.

agentFaqs.question: 9: How much time does it take to become an agent?
agentFaqs.answer: Just 2 minutes! Register on our website or app and start working right away.

agentFaqs.question: 10: When & how will I get my commission & worker's payment?
agentFaqs.answer: Once the employer confirms the joining and makes the payment to the company, the commission and worker’s payment are sent directly to your UPI/bank account the same day. (Note: Employer pays after job completion.)

employerFaqs.question: 1. What is BookMyWorker?
employerFaqs.answer: BookMyWorker is an online platform where you can easily find laborers, helpers, skilled workers, drivers, etc., through local Worker Service Agents in your area.

employerFaqs.question: 2. Can I request workers for any city or village?
employerFaqs.answer: Yes, you can request workers from anywhere in India. Our service is available nationwide.

employerFaqs.question: 3. How long will it take to get workers?
employerFaqs.answer: Usually workers are available within 24–48 hours. In some areas, same-day availability is possible.

employerFaqs.question: 4. Are the workers skilled?
employerFaqs.answer: We have both skilled and unskilled workers — like masons, welders, painters, drivers, loaders, and helpers.

employerFaqs.question: 5. Do I need to talk to the workers myself?
employerFaqs.answer: Yes, you will connect with a Worker or Service Agent via our app or website.

employerFaqs.question: 6. Who decides wages and conditions?
employerFaqs.answer: Wages are set by the Worker Service Agent. Employers can choose agents based on their budget.

employerFaqs.question: 7. What if a worker doesn't work or leaves midway?
employerFaqs.answer: In that case, immediately contact your assigned Worker Service Agent or our support team. We'll try to replace the worker quickly.

employerFaqs.question: 8. Is there a charge to request workers?
employerFaqs.answer: Requesting workers is free. Only a one-time lifetime registration fee is charged.

employerFaqs.question: 9. Can I request multiple workers at once?
employerFaqs.answer: Yes! You can request 1 to 20+ workers at once, based on your job needs.

employerFaqs.question: 10. How to request workers? What's the process?
employerFaqs.answer:
1. Post your requirement on our website or mobile app.
2. Or contact our support team via WhatsApp/Call — we'll post on your behalf.
3. You’ll be connected with a local Worker Service Agent.

servicesssss.heading: Our Services
servicesssss.subheading: We deliver verified manpower solutions for employers, contractors, and individuals—covering everything from skilled professionals to daily laborers.

groupLabor.title: Group or Individual Labor Supply
groupLabor.desc: We provide both individual workers and complete teams tailored to your project needs — be it for factories, construction sites, or farms.

skilled.title: Skilled Workers
skilled.desc: Hire certified and experienced professionals like electricians, painters, masons, and more for specialized tasks across various industries.

semiSkilled.title: Semi-Skilled Workforce
semiSkilled.desc: Our semi-skilled labor is adaptable for a variety of roles — capable of supporting technical teams, warehouse operations, and multitasking jobs.

helpers.title: Helpers & General Workers
helpers.desc: Get reliable helpers for cleaning, loading, farming, or miscellaneous site support. Ideal for employers, contractors, and even personal tasks.
